head_commit.message: refactor(ipv6): cleanup and add address family validation
refactor(ipv6): cleanup and add address family validation

address review comments for IPv6 support

- Simplify normalize_ip_address with if-let chain
- Rename family_ports to address_ports
- Fix duplicate map lookup in release_port
- Return &IpAddress from BoundPort::addr()
- Use .. pattern in can_reuse()
- Remove AF_INET6 DGRAM from sys_socket (not ready)
- Add address family validation in bind/connect
- Add TODO comment for type system encoding
- Remove tcp6.c regression test (covered by gVisor)
